flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Frank Phillips College fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (54.8% → 37.8%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Frank Phillips College fell 28% between 2006 and 2009 (26.9% → 19.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Frank Phillips College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (777 → 623).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Frank Phillips College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.3k → $3.7k).
